Thanks for the PR! A few quick checks before we look — these mirror
CONTRIBUTING.md. Keep the diff surgical and the description honest about
trade-offs.
-->

## What

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR change? -->

## Why

<!-- The motivation. Link the issue or Discussion if one exists. -->

Closes #

## How

<!-- Brief note on the approach, especially anything non-obvious. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Touched only what the change requires (no drive-by reformatting)
- [ ] No new runtime origins added to `manifest.json` (or, if added, discussed first)
- [ ] No secrets, captured cookies, or live DBD fixtures committed
- [ ] No new third-party network calls; no telemetry; no AI translation
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By: <AI>` trailers in commit messages

## Screenshots / RPC examples

For RPC changes, paste a request/response example. -->
